top_stories.title: PHL auto sales rebound in May
top_stories.summary: EVEN WITH the US-Iran war in full swing last May, local auto sales registered a hefty rebound, per the consolidated report from the Chamber of Automotive Manufacturers of the Philippines, Inc. (CAMPI) and Truck Manufacturers Association (TMA). Versus April, total May sales hiked by 24% to reach 33,532 units. Factori...

secondary_signals.title: Many roads, one destination
secondary_signals.summary: Over 200 kilometers from Mactan to this municipality at the northern tip of Cebu – and back – I got a firsthand look at how Toyota Motor Philippines (TMP) is advancing its multi-pathway strategy toward cleaner mobility.
